genre_refs: retro/vaporwave Americana aesthetic, vintage California convertible road photo
description: Slogan graphic built on a warm, sun-faded vintage photograph shot from behind a teal and aqua 1960s convertible on a palm-tree-lined street with distant hills ahead. The backs of two passengers' heads, a dark-haired person and a blonde person, are visible in the foreground; vintage cars line the curb. The image has heavy warm color grading, soft grain, and a sun-flare. A small circular agency seal sits centered. Overlaid across the middle in a white script font is the text 'Recapture the Dream'. No other body text appears on the image. The tweet text refers to reversing 'America Last, globalist policies' to 'Recapture the American Dream for the AMERICAN PEOPLE.'
